child_amenities.response: Child-friendly setup available! Baby crib (lit parapluie) and high chair provided | Child-safe features throughout | Please request baby equipment when booking

bed_setup.response: Flexible bed configuration available | Both king and queen options | Family rooms can accommodate additional bedding | Setup arranged based on your needs

safety.response: Property is child-proofed with safety features | Balcony barriers, outlet covers, sharp corner protection | Safe environment for families with young children

complaint_patterns: Baby equipment requests not always fulfilled
things_to_avoid: Don't assume all baby equipment is available — check stock first
Avoid guaranteeing sunset views from apartment (visible from rooftop only)
operational_notes: Popular with families traveling with young children
Baby crib (lit parapluie) and high chair available on request
Rooftop pool is the main amenity — mention it proactively
Kensington Square complex has security gate

response_templates.family: Great choice for families! We provide baby cribs and high chairs on request. The rooftop pool offers stunning sunset views — perfect for the little ones to splash around safely.

brand_voice_reminders: Paragraphs over bullet points in guest messages

services_to_mention.car_rental: Car rental services available on request
services_to_mention.luggage: Luggage drop-off available for early arrivals / late departures
